resume.summary: Motivated B.Tech Computer Science student with strong fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and system design. Experienced in building scalable backend systems and solving complex engineering problems. Seeking a Software Development Engineer Internship.

education.school: Cummins College of Engineering for Women, Pune
education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Advanced Algorithms, Distributed Systems, Database Systems, Software Engineering, OOP

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Data Structures & Algorithms, OOP, System Design, Multithreading
Spring Boot, REST APIs, JUnit, Git, GitHub

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Designed and implemented backend microservices using Spring Boot, serving 10,000+ daily requests.
Wrote unit and integration tests improving code coverage from 60% to 85%.
Participated in code reviews and sprint planning following Agile methodology.
Designed a distributed task scheduling system supporting retries and priority queues.
Achieved 99.5% task completion reliability under simulated load.
Built a RESTful API with JWT authentication and role-based access control.
Wrote comprehensive JUnit test suites covering 90%+ of business logic.
Solved 600+ problems across Codeforces and LeetCode, specializing in graphs and DP.
Achieved a rating in the top 10% on Codeforces Div 2 contests.

certification.title: Object Oriented Data Structures in C++ — University of Illinois
Programming Foundations with JavaScript, HTML and CSS

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
